title: Daniel/Matt Prep

notes:
Event Name: People Interview with Addi

Hi there!


Thank you for scheduling this time with me.


I’m Katherin from Addi. Addi is one of Latin America’s largest private fintechs (and maybe its next unicorn!). We’re a Series C company that has raised over $200 million from a16z, Union Square Ventures, Greycroft, GIC, and other investors.


Looking forward to our conversation!

Location: This is a Google Meet web conference.
You can join this meeting from your computer, tablet, or smartphone.
